x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HR catalog items enable Now Assist HRSD to guide employees through structured HR request intake. Low catalog coverage means AI-assisted HR request fulfillment cannot be offered for most HR service types.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Create HR catalog items for your top HR service types (benefits enrollment, leave requests, payroll questions). Target: 20+ active HR catalog items. Now Assist HRSD enhances catalog items with AI-assisted intake and guided fulfillment.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_c3f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c55
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[HR catalog items enable Now Assist HRSD to guide employees through structured HR request intake. Low catalog coverage means AI-assisted HR request fulfillment cannot be offered for most HR service types.]]></ai_justification><check_name>HR Service Catalog Coverage</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Count active catalog items linked to HR COEs via sc_cat_item
    // Using hr_service reference which links catalog to HRSD
    var gaHR = new GlideAggregate('sc_cat_item');
    gaHR.addQuery('active', true);
    gaHR.addQuery('sc_catalogs.title', 'CONTAINS', 'HR');
    gaHR.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaHR.query();
    var hrItems = gaHR.next() ? parseInt(gaHR.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    // Fallback: count all active catalog items if HR-filtered returns 0
    if (hrItems === 0) {
        var gaAll = new GlideAggregate('sc_cat_item');
        gaAll.addQuery('active', true);
        gaAll.addAggregate('COUNT');
        gaAll.query();
        var allItems = gaAll.next() ? parseInt(gaAll.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;
        var actualValue = '0 HR-specific catalog items found | ' + allItems + ' total active items (verify HR catalog configuration)';
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No HR-specific catalog items found. Verify HR catalog configuration — Now Assist HRSD AI-assisted intake requires catalog items for each key HR service type.'
        };
    }

    var actualValue = hrItems + ' active HR catalog items';

    if (hrItems >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: hrItems + ' active HR catalog items. Now Assist HRSD has broad catalog coverage for AI-assisted employee intake.'
        };
    } else if (hrItems >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + hrItems + ' active HR catalog items (target: 20+). Now Assist HRSD AI-assisted intake will have limited coverage for HR service types.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + hrItems + ' active HR catalog items. Insufficient catalog coverage for Now Assist HRSD AI-assisted employee intake.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>HRSD</module><number>CHK0000399</number><order>70</order><remediation_guidance>Create HR catalog items for your top HR service types (benefits enrollment, leave requests, payroll questions). Target: 20+ active HR catalog items. Now Assist HRSD enhances catalog items with AI-assisted intake and guided fulfillment.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>c3f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c55</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>HR Service Catalog Coverage</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_c3f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c55</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
